data.title: Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: DQN: experience replay + target networks stabilize deep Q-learning; Atari from pixels

data.title: Deterministic Policy Gradient Algorithms
data.key_finding: DPG: deterministic policy gradient theorem; foundation for DDPG

data.title: Trust Region Policy Optimization
data.key_finding: TRPO: monotonic improvement via KL-constrained surrogate objective

data.title: End-to-End Training of Deep Visuomotor Policies
data.key_finding: GPS + CNN policy for real robotic manipulation from raw pixels; foundational visuomotor RL

data.title: High-Dimensional Continuous Control Using Generalized Advantage Estimation
data.key_finding: Generalized Advantage Estimation; bias-variance tradeoff via exponential weighting of TD residuals

data.title: Continuous control with deep reinforcement learning
data.key_finding: DDPG: deterministic policy gradient + replay buffer for continuous action spaces

data.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning with Double Q-learning
data.key_finding: Double DQN: decouples selection and evaluation to reduce overestimation bias

data.title: Prioritized Experience Replay
data.key_finding: TD-error prioritization yields 2x faster learning; importance sampling correction

data.title: Dueling Network Architectures for Deep Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: Separate value and advantage streams improve sample efficiency on Atari

data.title: Asynchronous Methods for Deep Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: A3C: parallel actor-learners replace replay buffer; on-policy deep RL at scale

data.title: The Option-Critic Architecture
data.key_finding: End-to-end learning of options (temporally extended actions) via policy gradient over option policies

data.title: FeUdal Networks for Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: Manager-worker hierarchy with directional goals; transition policy gradient for multi-level learning

data.title: Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning for Fast Adaptation of Deep Networks
data.key_finding: MAML: gradient-based meta-learning; few-shot adaptation connects to adaptive control

data.title: Domain Randomization for Transferring Deep Neural Networks from Simulation to the Real World
data.key_finding: Randomizing visual parameters in sim enables zero-shot real-world transfer

data.title: Multi-Agent Actor-Critic for Mixed Cooperative-Competitive Environments
data.key_finding: MADDPG: centralized training + decentralized execution paradigm for multi-agent continuous control

data.title: Hindsight Experience Replay
data.key_finding: HER: relabel failed episodes as successes for alternative goals; sparse reward breakthrough

data.title: Proximal Policy Optimization Algorithms
data.key_finding: PPO: clipped surrogate objective achieves TRPO-level performance with first-order methods

data.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning that Matters
data.key_finding: Hyperparameters, seeds, and codebases cause more variance than algorithm differences

data.title: Rainbow: Combining Improvements in Deep Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: Combines 6 DQN improvements; establishes SOTA on Atari-57

data.title: Sim-to-Real Transfer of Robotic Control with Dynamics Randomization
data.key_finding: Progressive neural networks transfer learned features from sim to real without catastrophic forgetting

data.title: Mastering Chess and Shogi by Self-Play with a General Reinforcement Learning Algorithm
data.key_finding: AlphaZero: MCTS + neural network generalizes across chess, shogi, and Go

data.title: Soft Actor-Critic: Off-Policy Maximum Entropy Deep Reinforcement Learning with a Stochastic Actor
data.key_finding: SAC: entropy-regularized RL; stable off-policy learning for continuous control

data.title: Addressing Function Approximation Error in Actor-Critic Methods
data.key_finding: TD3: clipped double Q, delayed updates, target smoothing fix overestimation in DDPG

data.title: World Models
data.key_finding: VAE + MDN-RNN for learning environment dynamics in latent space; dream-based training

data.title: QMIX: Monotonic Value Function Factorisation for Deep Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: QMIX: factorized Q-function with monotonicity constraint; SOTA on StarCraft micromanagement

data.title: DeepMimic: Example-Guided Deep Reinforcement Learning of Physics-Based Character Skills
data.key_finding: DeepMimic: dynamics randomization + reference motion enables physical robot imitation

data.title: Reinforcement Learning and Control as Probabilistic Inference: Tutorial and Review
data.key_finding: Unifying tutorial: RL as inference in graphical model; connects entropy, KL, and optimal control

data.title: Data-Efficient Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: HIRO: off-policy correction for hierarchical goal-conditioned RL; enables reuse of experience

data.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning in a Handful of Trials using Probabilistic Dynamics Models
data.key_finding: PETS: ensemble of probabilistic NNs for planning; competitive with model-free in 100x fewer samples

data.title: A Tour of Reinforcement Learning: The View from Continuous Control
data.key_finding: Bridges control theory and RL; shows classical results imply strong baselines for RL benchmarks

data.title: Learning Dexterous In-Hand Manipulation
data.key_finding: PPO + domain randomization on Shadow Hand; precursor to Rubik's cube work

data.title: Differentiable MPC for End-to-end Planning and Control
data.key_finding: Backpropagation through MPC solver enables end-to-end learning of cost functions

data.title: Stochastic Control with Affine Dynamics and Extended Quadratic Costs
data.key_finding: Extends LQR beyond quadratic costs; convex formulation with constraints

data.title: Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels
data.key_finding: PlaNet: latent dynamics model with RSSM; planning in latent space from image observations

data.title: Soft Actor-Critic Algorithms and Applications
data.key_finding: SAC v2: automatic entropy tuning; state-of-the-art on MuJoCo locomotion benchmarks

data.title: When to Trust Your Model: Model-Based Policy Optimization
data.key_finding: MBPO: short model rollouts branching from real data; monotonic improvement guarantee

data.title: Solving Rubik's Cube with a Robot Hand
data.key_finding: Automatic domain randomization enables sim-to-real transfer for dexterous manipulation

data.title: Mastering Atari, Go, Chess and Shogi by Planning with a Learned Model
data.key_finding: MuZero: learns dynamics model without game rules; plans in latent space with MCTS

data.title: Dota 2 with Large Scale Deep Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: OpenAI Five: multi-agent RL at scale; beats world champion team in Dota 2

data.title: Objective Mismatch in Model-based Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: Maximum likelihood model training misaligned with control performance; proposes alternatives

data.title: CURL: Contrastive Unsupervised Representations for Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: Contrastive learning on augmented observations yields sample-efficient visual RL

data.title: Reinforcement Learning for Safety-Critical Control under Model Uncertainty, using Control Lyapunov Functions and Control Barrier Functions
data.key_finding: Combines control Lyapunov functions and control barrier functions with model-free RL

data.title: Offline Reinforcement Learning: Tutorial, Review, and Perspectives on Open Problems
data.key_finding: Comprehensive tutorial on distributional shift, pessimism, and offline policy evaluation

data.title: Implementation Matters in Deep Policy Gradients: A Case Study on PPO and TRPO
data.key_finding: Code-level choices (clipping, normalization) matter more than algorithm choice for PPO/TRPO

data.title: Conservative Q-Learning for Offline Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: CQL: lower-bounds Q-values on out-of-distribution actions; prevents overestimation without data

data.title: Benchmarking Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning Algorithms in Cooperative Tasks
data.key_finding: Independent PPO competitive with specialized MARL methods; questions need for complex architectures

data.title: Conditional Coupled Generative Adversarial Networks for Zero-Shot Domain Adaptation
data.key_finding: Taxonomy: domain randomization, system identification, domain adaptation, curriculum transfer

data.title: Mastering Atari with Discrete World Models
data.key_finding: DreamerV2: discrete latent representations; first world model to match model-free on Atari

data.title: Learning Quadrupedal Locomotion over Challenging Terrain
data.key_finding: Teacher-student distillation enables blind quadruped locomotion over rough terrain

data.title: The Value Equivalence Principle for Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: Model need only be value-equivalent, not observation-equivalent; formalizes decision-aware models

data.title: The Surprising Effectiveness of PPO in Cooperative, Multi-Agent Games
data.key_finding: MAPPO: simple PPO with parameter sharing matches specialized MARL algorithms on SMAC

data.title: Decision Transformer: Reinforcement Learning via Sequence Modeling
data.key_finding: Casts RL as sequence prediction conditioned on desired return; no Bellman backup needed

data.title: Mastering Visual Continuous Control: Improved Data-Augmented Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: DrQ-v2: simple augmentation + DDPG achieves state-of-the-art visual control; no encoder pretraining

data.title: Offline Reinforcement Learning with Implicit Q-Learning
data.key_finding: IQL: avoids querying out-of-distribution actions entirely via expectile regression

data.title: Temporal Difference Learning for Model Predictive Control
data.key_finding: TD-MPC: learned latent dynamics + MPPI planning + TD learning; sample-efficient continuous control

data.title: Value Gradient weighted Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: VaGraM: weights model gradients by value gradient magnitude; improves policy-relevant accuracy

data.title: A Review of Safe Reinforcement Learning: Methods, Theory and Applications
data.key_finding: Comprehensive taxonomy of safe RL: constrained MDPs, Lyapunov methods, barrier functions, shielding

data.title: A Survey on Model-based Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: Comprehensive taxonomy: dynamics models, planning, policy learning, and hybrid approaches

data.title: Transformers are Sample-Efficient World Models
data.key_finding: IRIS: autoregressive Transformer world model; 2 hours of game-play matches 50M frame methods

data.title: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models
data.key_finding: DreamerV3: single algorithm across 150+ tasks; symlog predictions + entropy regularization

data.title: Self-Supervised Learning from Images with a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture
data.key_finding: I-JEPA: predicts latent representations rather than pixels; avoids representation collapse

data.title: Real-world humanoid locomotion with reinforcement learning
data.key_finding: Zero-shot sim-to-real transfer for full-size humanoid walking in outdoor environments

data.title: Actor-Critic Model Predictive Control: Differentiable Optimization meets Reinforcement Learning for Agile Flight
data.key_finding: Augments MPC with learned value function as terminal cost; bridges optimality gap

data.title: Facing Off World Model Backbones: RNNs, Transformers, and S4
data.key_finding: S4WM: S4 world model competitive with GRU/Transformer on Atari; better long-term predictions

data.title: A Unified View on Solving Objective Mismatch in Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
data.key_finding: Unifies decision-aware model learning approaches under single theoretical framework

data.title: TD-MPC2: Scalable, Robust World Models for Continuous Control
data.key_finding: Single 317M-param world model across 104 tasks; no task-specific tuning

data.title: Structured state-space models are deep Wiener models
data.key_finding: SSMs equivalent to Wiener models in systems identification; control-theoretic interpretation

data.title: BP-MPC: Optimizing the Closed-Loop Performance of MPC using BackPropagation
data.key_finding: Differentiates through MPC rollout to optimize closed-loop cost over entire trajectory

data.title: Mastering Memory Tasks with World Models
data.key_finding: Recurrent imagination with reverse imagination for credit assignment over long horizons

data.title: Revisiting Feature Prediction for Learning Visual Representations from Video
data.key_finding: V-JEPA: self-supervised video representation via latent prediction; strong downstream transfer

data.title: Model Predictive Control and Reinforcement Learning: A Unified Framework Based on Dynamic Programming
data.key_finding: Formal unification of MPC and RL through abstract DP; rollout as common thread

data.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotics: A Survey of Real-World Successes
data.key_finding: Comprehensive survey of deployed RL systems; identifies common sim-to-real patterns

data.title: Drama: Mamba-Enabled Model-Based Reinforcement Learning Is Sample and Parameter Efficient
data.key_finding: Mamba world model matches DreamerV3 with 40% fewer parameters; SSM recurrence for latent dynamics

data.title: PixelBrax: Learning Continuous Control from Pixels End-to-End on the GPU
data.key_finding: Continuous control from pixels entirely in JAX; end-to-end differentiable

data.title: Synthesis of Model Predictive Control and Reinforcement Learning: Survey and Classification
data.key_finding: Survey of MPC-RL integration; taxonomy of combination strategies

data.title: A Survey of Sim-to-Real Methods in RL: Progress, Prospects and Challenges with Foundation Models
data.key_finding: Sim-to-real with foundation models survey

data.title: Accelerating Model-Based Reinforcement Learning with State-Space World Models
data.key_finding: SSM world models enable 10x faster imagination rollouts versus RNN-based Dreamer variants

data.title: Motion Control of High-Dimensional Musculoskeletal Systems with Hierarchical Model-Based Planning
data.key_finding: GPU-parallelized MPC with thousands of parallel solves; enables population-based MPC

data.title: A Survey of Safe Reinforcement Learning and Constrained MDPs: A Technical Survey on Single-Agent and Multi-Agent Safety
data.key_finding: Constrained MDP formulation for safe RL; Lagrangian and primal-dual approaches

data.title: Calibrated Value-Aware Model Learning with Probabilistic Environment Models
data.key_finding: Calibrates value-aware loss with bias-variance control; more stable than prior VAML methods

data.title: V-JEPA 2: Self-Supervised Video Models Enable Understanding, Prediction and Planning
data.key_finding: V-JEPA 2: unified video model for perception, prediction, and action; enables planning from video

data.title: A Review On Safe Reinforcement Learning Using Lyapunov and Barrier Functions
data.key_finding: Survey of Lyapunov and barrier function methods for safety guarantees in RL

data.title: Differentiable Model Predictive Control on the GPU
data.key_finding: GPU-accelerated differentiable MPC solver; enables batch optimization at scale

data.title: Cost-Matching Model Predictive Control for Efficient Reinforcement Learning in Humanoid Locomotion
data.key_finding: Learns MPC cost from RL demonstrations; applies to humanoid locomotion
